data.title: Babylon Foundation publishes "Hello World" and may announce TGE related news
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Babylon Foundation posted a message "Hello World" on the X platform with an attached video, and may announce TGE related news in the near future.

data.title: CoinShares: Digital asset investment products saw a net outflow of $508 million last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest weekly data from CoinShares, digital asset investment products saw a total outflow of $508 million last week, bringing the total outflow in the past two weeks to $924 million. From a regional perspective, outflows were mainly concentrated in the United States, with an outflow of $560 million, but this negative sentiment was not reflected in Europe, which continued to maintain healthy inflows, especially Germany and Switzerland, with $30.5 million and $15.8 million respectively.

data.title: Gate.io launches new airdrop event, participants in contract trading can receive GT rewards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch a new airdrop event from 18:00 on February 24, 2025 to 23:59 on March 3 (UTC+8). During the event, participants who participate in contract transactions for the first time and meet the specified conditions can receive up to 1 GT reward; for every contract transaction volume reaching or exceeding 30,000 USDT, they can receive a random airdrop of 0.1 GT - 0.5 GT, with a maximum reward of 4 GT per person.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies, and is the preferred platform for more than 21 million users worldwide.

data.title: Crypto ETPs see $508M outflow as Bitcoin sell-off continues — CoinShares
data.description:
Crypto ETPs saw $508 million in outflows last week, with Bitcoin ETFs losing $571 million. XRP funds recorded $38 million in inflows as investor sentiment remained cautious.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-etp-second-week-outflows-508-million-coinshares?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto ETPs Experience Significant Outflows Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs) experienced substantial outflows last week, continuing a trend of investor withdrawal. Digital asset investment firm CoinShares reported that crypto ETPs saw outflows totaling $508 million in the past trading week, following $415 million in outflows the previous week.

The increased selling pressure in the crypto ETP sector coincided with investor caution following the U.S. presidential inauguration and subsequent market uncertainties surrounding trade tariffs, inflation, and monetary policy, as noted by CoinShares research head James Butterfill. Bitcoin (BTC) ETPs, the largest crypto asset by market capitalization, suffered the most significant losses, while XRP (XRP) investment products experienced another week of major inflows.

Bitcoin investment products accounted for $571 million in outflows last week, highlighting the exclusive impact on Bitcoin. In contrast, altcoin ETPs recorded either some inflows or zero outflows, with XRP ETPs leading the buying trend with $38 million in inflows. Since November 2024, XRP ETPs have seen $819 million in inflows, reflecting investor optimism that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission will drop its lawsuit against Ripple and approve a spot XRP ETF. Solana (SOL), Ether (ETH), and Sui (SUI) followed with inflows of $8.9 million, $3.7 million, and $1.5 million, respectively.

The past trading week also marked a rare event for BlackRock’s iShares exchange-traded funds (ETF), which experienced losses of $22 million. ProShares ETFs were among the few major U.S. ETPs that did not post losses last week, recording $38 million in inflows, according to CoinShares. Meanwhile, crypto ETPs by Grayscale Investments and Fidelity Digital Assets saw the largest outflows, amounting to $170 million and $166 million, respectively.

Regionally, the majority of crypto ETP trading originated from the U.S., which saw $560 million in outflows. However, this negative trend was not mirrored in Europe, where steady inflows continued, with Germany and Switzerland leading with $30.5 million and $15.8 million in inflows, respectively.

data.title: Digital Asset Investment Products Experience Significant Outflows
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent data from CoinShares reveals that digital asset investment products saw a total outflow of $508 million last week. This brings the total outflow over the past two weeks to $924 million.

The outflows were predominantly from the United States, which accounted for $560 million. In contrast, Europe continued to experience healthy inflows, particularly in Germany and Switzerland, with $30.5 million and $15.8 million, respectively.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has exploded nearly 50 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $49.4624 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $44.3495 million and short orders have been liquidated for $5.1129 million.

data.title: Infini Addresses Security Concerns Amid Vulnerability Reports
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 24, digital bank Infini issued a statement acknowledging reports of a security vulnerability affecting its operations. The bank expressed regret for any concerns this may have caused and assured that its team is working around the clock to investigate and secure all systems. Despite the reported issues, Infini confirmed that all transactions, including transfers, deposits, withdrawals, and payments, are functioning normally.

data.title: Gate.io has launched the HODLer Airdrop section to lower the threshold for users to airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io has launched the HODLer Airdrop section on February 24, 2025 (UTC+8), and will migrate the GT holding exclusive airdrop project under the Startup platform to this section from now on. It is understood that in the future, the GT holding exclusive airdrop project will be carried out through HODLer Airdrop. Users only need to hold a minimum of 1 GT to participate, without locking positions and supporting participation in multiple projects at the same time, and easily receive high free airdrop rewards.

data.title: An Ethereum ICO-era ETH whale recharged 3,000 ETH to Kraken 3 hours ago, equivalent to about 8.18 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, a whale holding 20,000 ETH during the Ethereum ICO period recharged 3,000 ETH to Kraken 3 hours ago, worth 8.18 million US dollars; and in the past 3 months, the whale has sold a total of 9,910 ETH, with an average recharge price of 3,313 US dollars. If sold, it will make a profit of 32.83 million US dollars. He currently holds 4,070 ETH.
